name: technoax-fullstack
description: Technoax - AI Media Intelligence & Deepfake Detection (Full Stack)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend-text" "npm run dev:backend-video"
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend is Python - no build needed'
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend-text && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../backend-video && pip install -r requirements.txt
